title: 2026-06-08-04 - Korean Human-Facing Dashboard Normalization
어떤_작업: Rebuilt docs/orchestration/index.html as a Korean report dashboard.
진행_내용: HTML files were inspected through file reads.
Orchestration HTML is Korean-first and user-facing.
문제: The dashboard is currently hand-maintained and can drift from Markdown.
A generator is needed before this pattern scales comfortably across many projects.
